title: cyphostigma surculosum
intro: Cyphostigma surculosum, also known as the 'Rainbow Grass' or 'Rainbow Lily', is a species of flowering plant in the family Iridaceae, native to the Himalayan region. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, as it has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and respiratory problems, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Cyphostigma surculosum include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce pain and inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant properties, making it a popular herbal remedy. Cyphostigma surculosum can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal and therapeutic benefits.
